name: homelab-draw
title: Homelab Draw
description: Drive draw.lab + draw-bridge from Raycast — present canvases, import AI scenes, run the full pipeline.
author: zalewskigrzegorz

commands.name: present
commands.title: Draw: Present Canvas
commands.subtitle: Homelab Draw
commands.description: Pick a draw.lab canvas and open it in presentation mode via draw-bridge.

commands.name: import-ai
commands.title: Draw: Import AI Scene
commands.subtitle: Homelab Draw
commands.description: Send the draw-mcp scene.json into draw.lab as a new canvas.

commands.name: full-pipeline
commands.title: Draw: Full Pipeline
commands.subtitle: Homelab Draw
commands.description: Run the full draw pipeline: import draw-mcp scene → create canvas → open present mode.

preferences.name: drawUrl
preferences.title: Draw URL
preferences.description: Base URL of the draw.lab Excalidraw instance.
